Enumeration Case# kUSBLowLatencyWriteBuffer

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.2+

```
kUSBLowLatencyWriteBuffer = 0
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/usblowlatencybuffertype/kusblowlatencywritebuffer#discussion)

The buffer will be used to write data out to a device.
